title: RUSTPY-0011 — repr(classmethod(obj)) panics when the wrapped object's __repr__ raises (`classmethod.rs:198`)
one_line_repro: see repro.py -- repr(classmethod(obj)) where obj.__repr__ raises
notes: Exact sibling of RUSTPY-0009 (staticmethod.rs:182): Representable::repr_str does zelf.callable.lock().repr(vm).unwrap() -- a raising __repr__ panics instead of propagating. CPython raises ValueError. Deterministic 5/5. Fix = ? not .unwrap(); report together with 0009 as one .repr(vm).unwrap() sweep.
